mapper.update: UPDATE op_log SET status='CANCELLED', active_key=NULL, ended_at=#{endedAt}, current_step='已取消' WHERE id=#{id} AND status='QUEUED'
UPDATE op_log SET status='DONE', active_key=NULL, ended_at=#{endedAt}, progress_pct=100, current_step='已完成' WHERE id=#{id} AND status='RUNNING'
UPDATE op_log SET status='FAILED', active_key=NULL, ended_at=#{endedAt}, current_step='已失败', error_code=#{errorCode}, error_msg=#{errorMsg} WHERE id=#{id} AND status='RUNNING'
UPDATE op_log SET status='TIMED_OUT', active_key=NULL, ended_at=#{endedAt}, current_step='已超时', error_code='TIMED_OUT', error_msg=#{errorMsg} WHERE id=#{id} AND status='RUNNING'
UPDATE op_log SET status='FAILED', active_key=NULL, ended_at=NOW(), current_step='已失败', error_code='WORKER_LOST', error_msg='应用重启时该 op 仍在 RUNNING, 视为僵尸' WHERE status='RUNNING'
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM op_log WHERE active_key=#{activeKey} LIMIT 1
